title: API Documentation
scenario: Document an API endpoint using a specific format (e.g., OpenAPI, Swagger). The API endpoint should be provided in a brief paragraph, and the output documentation should include all necessary details (e.g., endpoint URL, method, request body, response codes).
constraints: Must include all necessary details for the API endpoint
Must use a specific API documentation format

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the documentation accurately covers all necessary details for the API endpoint
Evaluate if the documentation maintains a consistent format (e.g., OpenAPI, Swagger)
Assess the readability of the documentation
Check if the documentation is grammatically correct and properly punctuated
